summary: Classified InGen hybrid — codename Scorpios rex. Unstable genome expression; quilled integument and neurotoxic traits place it outside standard recovery protocols.
facts: Quills along head and forelimbs — defensive and display structures.
Reported hemolytic venom; field teams must use sealed suits.
Genome includes abelisaur and unidentified splice markers.
Subject was believed terminated; embryo recovery confirms surviving lineage.
fieldNotes: AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY. Assume specimen is aware of tracker emissions.
